'''C-9PO''', pronounced as '''See-Ninepio''' or '''Ninepio''' for short, was a copper-colored [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that was purchased and modified by [[Brakiss]] for use on [[Telti/Legends|Telti]].<ref name="The New Rebellion" />

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
C-9PO first appeared in the [[1996]] novel ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', written by [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]].<ref name="The New Rebellion" /> Another [[Droid/Legends|droid]] designated [[C-9PO (Rhommamool)|C-9PO]] appeared in the [[1999]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]].<ref name="Vector Prime">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> The two droids were confirmed to be separate characters by the entry for C-9PO in the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="C-9PO CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|103|C-9PO}}</ref>
